note: seq=110: ⭐ BACKUP/DR -- deploy the existing atlas_backup.py (disk-aware pg_dump of tuanichat_atlas custom/compressed + retention 7 + restore smoke-test via pg_restore --list) on a NIGHTLY timer (it was deployed in seq-4 but never cycled -> the 1.4M-record asset has had NO running backup). Runs the FIRST backup now (--no-block) and self-verifies it's restorable. HONEST: this is a RETAINED LOCAL backup (protects against logical errors/DROP/corruption + restore-tested). True OFF-BOX DR (disk-failure protection) needs ATLAS_BACKUP_OFFBOX_CMD (rsync to InterServer/storage box) + an ssh key -- one env-var away once a key exists; flagged. fetch+sha-verify(47832f3ad51d); registered with watcher next.

steps.note: seq=110: nightly backup/DR (pg_dump+retention+restore-test); first backup runs now.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_backup.py':'47832f3ad51dae46e4c122bde85bb937cda5f97fd0db12eb1a1a10af3409b11a'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('backup sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS nightly backup (pg_dump + retention + restore smoke-test)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=ATLAS_BACKUP_RETAIN=7
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_backup.py
TimeoutStartSec=3600

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backup nightly

[Timer]
OnBootSec=6min
OnCalendar=*-*-* 02:30:00
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=300

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-backup.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-backup.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-backup.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-backup.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-backup.service']); print('backup nightly timer live + first backup running')"
